speaker: Narrator
text: The lights flicker, casting an ominous glow on the faces of the unsuspecting players. The air is thick with tension as alliances are formed and tempers fray, all while the silent assassins lurk in the shadows, biding their time. The game has begun, but at what cost will you pay to survive?

speaker: Narrator
text: The air is thick with tension as the 9 remaining players gather to discuss their fate. Allegiances are tested and deals are whispered in the shadows. With no clear leader emerging, a fractured coalition of interests takes shape, setting the stage for the inevitable showdown. The votes are cast, revealing two names: Frank and Ivy, who will meet their demise at the hands of their unsuspecting peers.
